name: Interrupt — cancel / never mind
instructions: The caller wants to cancel or was just looking for information. Confirm without pushing and ask whether to leave a note on the policy that they reached out, in case they decide to file later. Capture 'leave_note' (boolean) and fire log_no_file (the backend decides what to do with leave_note).

entry_condition.expression: Caller says they want to cancel, don't want to file after all, or were just looking for information.

condition.expression: Caller has answered whether to leave a note on the policy.
